name: @gdexsdk/gdex-skill
description: Cross-chain DeFi trading skill for AI agents — spot trading, perpetual futures, portfolio management, and token discovery on Solana, Sui, and 12+ EVM chains.

auth.description: All trading uses AES-256-CBC encrypted computedData payloads. API keys derive the AES key via SHA256 hash chain. Session keypairs (secp256k1) sign trade payloads with raw recoveryParam (v=00/01) after initial control-wallet sign-in. Nonces are client-generated.

actions.name: buy_token
actions.description: Buy a token on any supported chain (Solana, Sui, Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, BSC, and more) using the best available DEX route.

chain.description: Blockchain chain. Use 'solana', 'sui', or a ChainId number (e.g. 1=Ethereum, 8453=Base, 42161=Arbitrum, 56=BSC).

tokenAddress.description: Contract address of the token to buy.

amount.description: Amount of the input (native) token to spend. E.g. '0.1' for 0.1 SOL.

slippage.description: Maximum slippage tolerance in percent. Default: 1.

dex.description: Preferred DEX to use. If omitted, best route is selected automatically.

walletAddress.description: Wallet address to execute the trade from.

actions.name: sell_token
actions.description: Sell a token on any supported chain. Amount can be absolute (e.g. '100') or a percentage of holdings (e.g. '50%').

tokenAddress.description: Contract address of the token to sell.

amount.description: Amount to sell. Can be an absolute number (e.g. '100') or a percentage like '50%'.

slippage.description: Maximum slippage tolerance in percent. Default: 1.

walletAddress.description: Wallet address to execute the trade from.

actions.name: open_perp_position
actions.description: Open a perpetual futures position on HyperLiquid. Supports long and short with configurable leverage, take-profit, and stop-loss.

sizeUsd.description: Position collateral in USD notional, e.g. '1000'.

actions.name: close_perp_position
actions.description: Close an open perpetual position on HyperLiquid, fully or partially.

closePercent.description: Percentage of position to close (1–100). Default: 100.

actions.name: get_perp_positions
actions.description: Retrieve all open perpetual positions for a wallet on HyperLiquid.

coin.description: Optional filter to a specific asset, e.g. 'BTC'.

actions.name: set_perp_leverage
actions.description: Set the leverage for a perpetual asset on HyperLiquid.

actions.name: perp_deposit
actions.description: Deposit USDC into the HyperLiquid perpetual account.

actions.name: perp_withdraw
actions.description: Withdraw USDC from the HyperLiquid perpetual account.

actions.name: hl_update_leverage
actions.description: Update leverage for a specific asset on HyperLiquid via managed-custody signed payload.

isCross.description: True for cross margin, false for isolated. Default: true.

actions.name: limit_buy
actions.description: Create a limit buy order — buy a token when its price drops to a target. Uses ABI-encoded + signed + AES-encrypted computedData.

amount.description: Native token to spend in raw units (wei/lamports).

triggerPrice.description: USD price at which to trigger the buy.

actions.name: limit_sell
actions.description: Create a limit sell order — sell a token when price reaches a target. Auto-classifies as take-profit or stop-loss. Uses ABI-encoded + signed + AES-encrypted computedData.

amount.description: Token amount to sell in raw units.

triggerPrice.description: USD price at which to trigger the sell.

actions.name: update_order
actions.description: Update or delete an existing limit order. Set isDelete=true to cancel. Uses ABI-encoded + signed + AES-encrypted computedData.

amount.description: New amount in raw units (optional for update).

triggerPrice.description: New trigger price in USD (optional for update).

isDelete.description: Set true to cancel/delete the order.

actions.name: get_limit_orders
actions.description: List active limit orders for a user on a specific chain. Uses session-key auth (encrypted data query param).

actions.name: get_portfolio
actions.description: Fetch the full cross-chain portfolio for a wallet — all token balances with USD values.

actions.name: get_balances
actions.description: Get token balances for a wallet on a specific chain.

actions.name: get_trade_history
actions.description: Get historical trades for a wallet.

actions.name: get_token_details
actions.description: Get detailed information about a token: price, market cap, liquidity, DEX pools, social links. No authentication required.

actions.name: get_trending_tokens
actions.description: Get trending tokens sorted by volume and price change. No authentication required.

actions.name: get_ohlcv
actions.description: Get OHLCV candlestick data for a token. No authentication required.

actions.name: get_top_traders
actions.description: Get the top performing trader wallets ranked by P&L.

actions.name: bridge
actions.description: Bridge tokens from one blockchain to another.

actions.name: get_bridge_quote
actions.description: Get a cross-chain bridge quote without executing a transaction.

actions.name: get_wallet_info
actions.description: Get wallet information including native token balance.

actions.name: add_copy_trade_wallet
actions.description: Add a wallet to copy trade tracking.

actions.name: remove_copy_trade_wallet
actions.description: Remove a wallet from copy trade tracking.

actions.name: get_copy_trade_wallets
actions.description: Get all wallets being tracked for copy trading.

actions.name: set_copy_trade_settings
actions.description: Configure copy trading settings (max trade size, slippage, chains, etc.).

actions.name: managed_sign_in
actions.description: Sign in to GDEX managed-custody system using encrypted computedData. Requires a control wallet signature.

actions.name: managed_purchase
actions.description: Submit an encrypted managed-custody buy trade via /v1/purchase_v2.

computedData.description: AES-encrypted trade payload with signed data.

actions.name: managed_sell
actions.description: Submit an encrypted managed-custody sell trade via /v1/sell_v2.

computedData.description: AES-encrypted trade payload with signed data.

actions.name: managed_trade_status
actions.description: Poll the status of a managed-custody trade by requestId.

requestId.description: The request ID returned from purchase/sell submission.

actions.name: generate_session_keypair
actions.description: Generate a secp256k1 session keypair for managed-custody trade signing. Returns sessionPrivateKey and sessionKey (compressed public key).
